sections.paragraph:
Original: שׂטם

Transliteration: śâṭam

Phonetic: saw-tam'

BDB Definition:

  1. to hate, oppose oneself to, bear a grudge, retain animosity against, cherish animosity against
    1. (Qal) to cherish animosity against

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2251

Part(s) of speech: Verb
